properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come all ye weary and ye broken Come to the table of the Lord Come sing the song of the forgiven Come lay your burden on the word

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come and find peace Everyone needs a little rest Everyone needs a little joy And a song to sing in the darkest night And life even when it gets you down Hope will turn it all around But love is the greatest of these Everyone needs a little

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sing all ye saints and ye sinners Call upon the mercy of the Lord Come sing the song of redemption Sing about the hope that is to come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He will lift you up He will lift you up higher than sorrow He will lift you up And cover your soul with healing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Peace Everyone needs a little rest Everyone needs a little joy And a song to sing in the darkest night

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And life even when it gets you down Hope will turn it all around But love is the greatest of these Everyone needs a little Everyone needs a little Everyone needs a little
